hyperedges.label: POS outbox sync pipeline (queue, mapping, enqueue trigger, claim/mark RPCs, addon gate)
Owner analytics view layer (RFM, LTV, dormancy, top items, revenue)
uid-lookup RLS helper + JWT-claim auth model (platform_admins, restaurant_owners, helper fns, metadata triggers)
Loyalty earn-on-order flow: bookkeeping trigger + earn trigger + tier computation + ledger
Loyalty redemption flow: redeem/fulfill/cancel RPCs over redemptions + ledger tables
Order cancellation audit trail: reasons catalog + events table + status-change trigger over orders
submit_order order-creation pipeline (branch resolution + atomic numbering + price validation)
Branch-scoped RBAC + JWT claim refresh model
Delivery zone routing: radius + polygon service areas resolved via find_nearest_branch
DS-1 QR design pipeline: template -> tenant profile -> export
DS-8 motion arch-space: template -> profile -> export (mirrors QR pattern)
Export fingerprint composes the three public anon RPCs (menu + promotions + design)

nodes.label: Rationale: replace anon direct writes with one SECURITY DEFINER RPC
Rationale: JWT claims nested under app_metadata so jwt()->>claim was NULL
Rationale: AFTER INSERT fired before order_items existed; defer to COMMIT
Rationale: MenuLink owns channel reporting; InvoiceType mapping per order_type
Rationale: pos_bridge addon as master kill-switch over pos_settings.enabled
Rationale: loyalty earn in EXCEPTION-wrapped separate trigger so a loyalty bug can never break order insertion
Rationale: z_ trigger name prefix so loyalty trigger fires alphabetically after orders_touch_customer
Rationale: first-claim-wins hijack guard refuses to link a phone already bound to another auth_user_id
Rationale: anon menu/account pages need addon+loyalty config reads (hotfix for authenticated-only policies)
Rationale: account page needs direct restaurant-header read for anon (RPC hid the RLS gap)
Rationale: switch to=anon to to=public so signed-in customers (authenticated role) also read config tables
Rationale: lazy expiry on next earn avoids cron/scheduled jobs
Rationale: SFDA compliance mandates calorie/allergen/sodium/caffeine display on digital menus since July 2025
Rationale: customer_id made nullable because PWA sends null for anon visitors (subscribe was silently failing)
Rationale: server-side price validation — unit_price>=variant price, modifier delta capped at 30 SAR
addon_catalog name_en/description_en columns + 7 ops addon seeds
Rationale: skip cancellations (admin inserts event manually with reason)
Rationale: single-branch tenants work unchanged; multi-branch gated by multi_branch addon
Rationale: business day defined by branch start/end; 2AM counts as yesterday for 10AM-4AM venues
Rationale: roles owner/branch_manager/cashier/accountant/viewer; owner sees all branches
restaurant_tables QR enhancement (qr_token, bilingual names, is_active)
Rationale: 0038 rewrite dropped session_id, broke dine-in sessions; restored here
Rationale: isolated RzRz test clone, dummy WhatsApp, no pos_bridge addon, never touches live tenants
Rationale: claim priority platform_admin > restaurant_owner > restaurant_admin
point_in_polygon(lat, lng, geojson) RPC (ray-casting, no PostGIS)
Mazaj Almosafer tenant seed (176 items, display-only)
Rationale: foundation-only, additive, no existing tenant affected (DS-1)
Rationale: SECURITY DEFINER lets anon read design without public RLS policy
Rationale: scan tracking is best-effort, never blocks the redirect
Rationale: future-schema foundation only; mirrors qr template/profile/export pattern
Rationale: nullable+additive, no backfill keeps existing tenants unchanged
Four surfaces (marketing / customer PWA / admin / ops)
RLS pattern: auth.uid() lookups via owns_restaurant + is_platform_admin (not JWT claims)
Table sessions model (dine-in open tabs, session_id, 8hr expire)
0071: get_tenant_owners gated on is_platform_admin() (was JWT role claim)
0071: pos_outbox RPCs locked to service_role (revoked from authenticated)
